AMENDED ANSWER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT VOGAN, MICHAEL
TRIAL ASSIGNED TO DEPARTMENT 304

COURT TRIAL BEFORE HONORABLE STUART POLLAK. LESLEY SCHNEIDER REPORTING. GARTH SAYERS, CLERK. ROOM 304. PARTIES, COUNSEL PRESENT. WITNESSES WERE SWORN AND EXAMINED AS PER WITNESS LIST. DOCUMENTARY EXHIBITS WERE MARKED, MOVED, AND ENTERED INTO EVIDENCE PER THE EXHIBIT LIST. THE COURT ENTERED JUDGMENT FOR PLAINTIFF AND AGAINST DEFENDANT. PREMISES AT 837 GEARY ST. #102 SHALL BE RESTORED TO PLAINTIFF. $1,041.84 WAS AWARDED FOR BACK RENT AND DAMAGES. ATTORNEY FEES & COSTS WERE WAIVED. EVIDENCE WAS ORDERED RETURNED TO COUNSEL FOR SAFE KEEPING.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VOGAN, MICHAEL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 837 GEARY STREET #102 $1,041.84 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,041.84, LEASE FORFEITED
